_Gov24CertificateOutput.description:
Placeholder output schema.

Real shape tracks the Gov24 public API certificate endpoint spec. Mock
returns a synthetic fixture stamped with the six transparency fields.
_Gov24CertificateOutput.title: _Gov24CertificateOutput

description:
Input schema for mock_lookup_module_gov24_certificate.

Pydantic v2 strict model (extra='forbid', frozen=True).

certificate_type.description: Type of certificate to look up. resident_registration: 주민등록등본 (resident registration extract). family_relations: 가족관계증명서 (family relations certificate). business_registration: 사업자등록증 (business registration certificate).
certificate_type.title: Certificate Type

purpose.description: Purpose for which the certificate is requested (제출 목적). Example: '금융기관 제출용', '취업 지원 제출용'.
purpose.title: Purpose

title: mock_lookup_module_gov24_certificate
